reasoning: With only two months left in 2025, the probability of an OpenAI AGI announcement is extremely small. According to OpenAI's own 5-level scale, AGI is reached at Level 5 ("Organizations"); currently, the company is just entering Level 3 ("Agents") in 2025, meaning they are two major technological milestones away. Furthermore, leaked reporting suggests a contractual definition of AGI with Microsoft requires the AI to generate $100 billion in profit—a milestone OpenAI is nowhere near achieving, given current projections predicting unprofitability until 2029. Declaring AGI prematurely would uniquely sever Microsoft's access to OpenAI IP under their contract, which carries enormous legal and financial ramifications. Consequently, an announcement before year's end is very highly unlikely. The recent Polymarket price of 4% aligns closely with this near-zero outlook.
batch_queries: OpenAI official definition of AGI and stated timeline
OpenAI recent announcements model capabilities towards AGI 2025
expert opinions on OpenAI achieving AGI by 2025
OpenAI internal levels of AGI current progress status
why OpenAI AGI timeline might be delayed beyond 2025
